articles.description: A new bill entitled the ‘Blockchain Basics Act’ that would effectively ban central bank digital currencies (CBDCs) passed into law in the state of Louisiana this week, Co-founder and CEO Dennis Porter of crypto non-profit the Satoshi Action Fund announced Monday. Louisiana joins three other states who have recently passed similar pro-Bitcoin legislation.
